2605.18067.title: PPAI: Enabling Personalized LLM Agent Interoperability for Collaborative Edge Intelligence
2605.18067.paper_summary: Deploying large language model (LLM) on edge device enables personalized LLM agents for various users. The growing availability of diverse personalized agents presents a unique opportunity for peer-to-peer (P2P) collaboration, wherein each user can delegate tasks beyond the local agent's expertise to remote agents more suited for the specific query. This paper introduces PPAI, the first personalized LLM agent interoperability system, which enables users to collaborate with each other based on agent specialization. However, the ever-changing pool of agents and their interchangeable capacity introduce new challenges when it comes to matching queries to agents and balancing loads, compared with existing P2P systems. Therefore, we propose a scalable query-agent pair scoring mechanism based on prototypes to identify suitable agents within a P2P network with churn. Moreover, we propose a multi-agent interoperability Bayesian game to balance local demand and global efficiency, when changes in remote agent load occur too quickly to be observed. Finally, we implement a prototype of PPAI and demonstrate that it substantially broadens the range of tasks that could be carried out while maintaining load balance. On average, it achieves an accuracy improvement of up to 7.96% across multiple tasks, while reducing latency by 16.34% compared to the baseline.
2605.18067.paper_summary_zh: 在邊緣設備上部署大型語言模型（LLM）使得為各種用戶提供個性化LLM代理成為可能。日益增長的多樣化個性化代理的可用性為點對點（P2P）協作提供了獨特的機會，其中每個用戶可以將超出本地代理專業知識的任務委派給更適合特定查詢的遠程代理。本文介紹了PPAI，第一個個性化LLM代理互操作系統，該系統使得用戶能夠根據代理專業化進行協作。然而，隨著代理池的不斷變化及其可互換性，與現有的P2P系統相比，在將查詢匹配到代理和負載平衡方面引入了新的挑戰。因此，我們提出了一種基於原型的可擴展查詢-代理配對評分機制，以識別在有變動的P2P網絡中合適的代理。此外，我們提出了一種多代理互操作貝葉斯遊戲，以在遠程代理負載變化過快而無法觀察時平衡本地需求和全球效率。最後，我們實現了PPAI的原型，並展示了它在保持負載平衡的同時顯著擴大了可執行任務的範圍。平均而言，與基線相比，它在多個任務中實現了高達7.96%的準確性提升，同時降低了16.34%的延遲。
2605.18067.author: Zile Wang et.al.
2605.18067.authors: Zile Wang, Qianli Liu, Kaibin Guo, Haodong Wang, Jian Lin, Zicong Hong, Song Guo
